creator: gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
text:
Update to 1.4.3

Fix: http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/freebsd-patches/ports/pgadmin3-1.4.3.patch

PORTNAME=      pgadmin3
-PORTVERSION=   1.4.2
+PORTVERSION=   1.4.3
 CATEGORIES=    databases
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_PGSQL}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    pgadmin3/release/v${PORTVERSION}/src
